entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop being evaluated for resistance to downy mildew and smut

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola that limits pearl millet productivity

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: SMUT
entities.description: A disease caused by Moesziomyces penicillariae that limits pearl millet productivity

entities.name: MOESZIOMYCES PENICILLARIAE
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes smut in pearl millet

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: One of the regions where pearl millet productivity is limited by downy mildew and smut

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: One of the regions where pearl millet productivity is limited by downy mildew and smut

entities.name: F1 HYBRIDS
entities.description: Commercial hybrids of pearl millet that are more susceptible to diseases than open-pollinated varieties

entities.name: OPEN-POLLINATED VARIETIES
entities.description: Pearl millet varieties that are less susceptible to diseases than commercial F1 hybrids

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: A-lines of pearl millet being developed for genetic diversity and disease resistance

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: A characteristic being developed in cytoplasmic male-sterile lines

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: A characteristic being developed and evaluated in pearl millet lines
